The Walker Kessler trade has reshaped the Los Angeles Lakers' frontcourt, and it cost them nearly everything left in the vault. Utah sent the 7-foot-2 center to Los Angeles this week in a sign-and-trade that pairs him with Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves, but the price included four premium draft assets.Whether that gamble pays off now hinges on health, fit, and a contract some analysts already consider an overpay before Kessler plays a single game in purple and gold.Kessler's new deal runs four years at $130 million, an annual average of $32.5 million, with a player option in the final season and a full trade kicker attached. Bleacher Report 's Zach Buckley flagged the deal as one of the offseason's steepest overpays, noting Kessler has never made an All-Star or All-NBA roster and that his contract "feels rich for Walker Kessler." Buckley pointed to Kessler's limited scoring range and his 127 total appearances over the past three seasons, including just five games last year after shoulder surgery.The bigger concern isn't the salary alone. It's what Los Angeles surrendered to get him. Four first-round assets, split between outright picks and swaps, represent nearly all the draft capital the Lakers had left to trade.The move traces directly back to Doncic. According to Dan Woike of The Athletic, Kessler was "a player Dončić wanted at center most of all," and a team source believed he'd fit "perfectly" alongside Doncic and Reaves.With LeBron James departing the roster this offseason, the Lakers moved quickly to give their franchise cornerstone the rim-running, shot-blocking presence he'd been requesting.Kessler brings genuine two-way upside when healthy, a 68.1% career shooter who thrives on lobs, cuts, and putbacks, exactly the kind of finishing Doncic's pick-and-roll game demands. The question is durability. He's played through recurring injury issues, and the Lakers now have no realistic path to recoup draft capital if this doesn't work.The Lakers enter training camp with their highest-stakes bet of the offseason already placed. How Kessler performs in his first extended run in a major market, and how quickly he returns from shoulder surgery, will determine whether this trade defines a new contending core or becomes the move Lakers fans point to when explaining what went wrong.
Article Summary: Walker Kessler's new deal runs four years at $130 million, an annual average of $32.5 million. Bleacher Report's Zach Buckley flagged the deal as one of the offseason's steepest overpays. Four first-round assets represent nearly all the draft capital the Lakers had left to trade.

Article Title: Who is Marcellus Wiley? Ex- Buffalo Bills star arrested on domestic battery charge amid ongoing legal troubles
Article Text:
Who is Marcellus Wiley? Ex- Buffalo Bills star arrested on domestic battery charge amid ongoing legal troubles(Getty)

From Buffalo Bills draft pick to Pro Bowl defender and TV analyst

Domestic battery arrest adds to Wiley's growing legal challenges

Marcellus Wiley has found himself in the spotlight again, but this time it has nothing to do with football. The former NFL defensive end was arrested in Orange County, Florida, on a domestic battery charge. Jail records show the 51-year-old remained in custody without bond as of July 5, while authorities have yet to release details about the alleged incident.The arrest of Marcellus Wiley has raised fresh questions about the former Dallas Cowboys and Buffalo Bills star, whose successful NFL career and broadcasting journey now sit alongside a growing list of legal troubles.Marcellus Wiley entered the NFL when the Buffalo Bills selected him in the second round of the 1997 NFL Draft out of Columbia University. He spent four seasons in Buffalo before signing with the then San Diego Chargers in 2001.That move proved to be the best of his playing career. Wiley posted a career-high 13 sacks during the 2001 season and earned the only Pro Bowl selection of his career. His strong pass-rushing ability made him one of the Chargers' top defensive players that year.After three seasons with the Chargers, Wiley joined the Dallas Cowboys in 2004.He later finished his NFL career with the Jacksonville Jaguars, playing the 2005 and 2006 seasons before retiring. Across 10 NFL seasons, he appeared in 166 regular-season games and recorded 44 sacks.Retirement opened another chapter. Wiley quickly moved into sports media, working for ESPN on shows including NFL Live and SportsNation. He later joined Fox Sports, where he became a familiar face on debate programs before launching his own podcast and YouTube channel.Wiley's profile grew even more after retirement. His outspoken style helped him build a second career in sports media, where he regularly discussed NFL storylines and league issues. Over the years, he became a familiar voice on national television before shifting his focus to digital content through his own podcast and YouTube channel.The latest Marcellus Wiley news comes after Orange County Jail records showed he was booked on a domestic battery charge on July 4. TMZ first reported the arrest. Officials have not released an arrest affidavit or identified the alleged victim, leaving many questions unanswered. Wiley remained in custody without bond as of July 5, according to jail records.The arrest comes only weeks after several women publicly accused Wiley of sexual assault through court filings. Reports published in May 2026 said a former ESPN employee and three other women made allegations that dated from the 1990s through 2009. Those claims are separate from the current domestic battery case.Wiley has denied every sexual assault allegation. Speaking on his YouTube podcast on May 5, 2026, he said, "They are attempting to leverage lies for personal gain, as they say, assassination by accusation; that's their goal. They're trying by lying." He added that he would continue to challenge what he called false accusations.Neither Wiley nor his representatives have publicly commented on the domestic battery arrest. For now, the former Pro Bowler's football achievements remain part of his legacy, but the legal cases have become the focus as the court process moves forward.
Article Summary: Marcellus Wiley was arrested in Orange County, Florida, on a domestic battery charge. The 51-year-old was drafted by the Buffalo Bills in the second round of the 1997 NFL Draft. He went on to play for the San Diego Chargers, Dallas Cowboys and Jacksonville Jaguars. After retiring from football, he moved into sports media, working for ESPN and Fox Sports.

Article Title: The Taylor Swift and Blake Lively friendship is officially over after a shocking wedding snub, say insiders
Article Text:
Blake Lively and Taylor Swift (Getty Images)

Why wasn't Blake Lively invited to Taylor Swift's wedding?

Is the Taylor Swift and Blake Lively Friendship Over?

Taylor Swift and Blake Lively (Getty Images)

Blake Lively spent the weekend of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce 's July 3 wedding at a horse show in Lake Placid, New York -- hundreds of miles from Madison Square Garden, where the couple exchanged vows. Photos obtained by TMZ showed Lively and husband Ryan Reynolds cheering on their daughter Betty at a local farm competition, a sight that quietly confirmed what weeks of insider reports had left open to speculation: Lively was not on the guest list. For a friendship that once spanned over a decade, the snub lands with particular weight.The roots of the falling out trace back to 2025 and the legal firestorm surrounding Lively's film It Ends With Us. When Blake Lively filed a civil lawsuit against director Justin Baldoni in December 2024 -- alleging sexual harassment and a coordinated smear campaign -- Swift was pulled into the narrative through an alleged informal meeting she had with Lively, Baldoni, and Reynolds over Lively's involvement in the project. Swift was not happy about it.The lawsuit was eventually settled earlier in 2026, with neither party receiving any financial payout.As the legal noise faded, so too did some of the tension -- at least according to sources who spoke to The Daily Mail in June, claiming Taylor Swift had extended an "olive branch" to Lively with a reconciliation phone call weeks before the wedding. A source for Extra later denied that report outright.Multiple insiders had suggested in the weeks leading up to the ceremony that things were warming between the two. "Taylor was not happy about being dragged into the lawsuit but was more receptive to speaking to Blake as the suit came to a close," one source said. "Blake was ready to resume their friendship because it really was what caused its demise." Another added: "Blake is on the cusp of getting a second chance, and they have had some loose conversations to test the waters to get the trust back. "There were even reports, via Rob Shuter's Naughty But Nice Substack, that Blake Lively had a dress picked out on the off chance a last-minute invitation arrived. "Blake genuinely believes there's still a path back," the insider said. "Now that the legal mess is over, she thinks the hardest part is behind her and there's real hope they can move forward." The photos from Lake Placid suggest that path remains closed, at least for now.What makes the exclusion more pointed is the company that was invited. The wedding guest list reportedly included Sacha Baron Cohen, Brad Pitt, and Steven J. Demetriou -- figures who have faced their own serious allegations in public life. The apparent line was drawn at Lively, whose drama had the misfortune of ensnaring Swift directly.Taylor Swift and Blake Lively's friendship had been one of the more visible in celebrity circles -- long-standing, publicly warm, and seemingly bulletproof. The fracture began quietly. When Swift announced her engagement to Kelce, Lively did not publicly congratulate her, which sources at the time read as a telling silence. From there, the two appeared to exist in separate orbits, even as Swift remains the godmother to Lively and Reynolds' children.Sources close to Lively insist she has never fully given up. "She knows not everything snaps back overnight," one insider said. "But Blake believes removing the chaos changes everything. She thinks once the noise is gone, there's room for real healing." Another source claimed the two "never fully stopped being friends" and that Lively's image concerns were also a factor -- she reportedly did not "want to be seen as not going to the wedding. "Swift and Kelce married at Madison Square Garden on July 3, 2026. The venue announced the news on the jumbotron with the text "JUST&T MARRIED!" Both wore Christian Dior Haute Couture designed by Jonathan Anderson. Swift's brother Austin served as her Man of Honor, while Kelce's brother Jason was Best Man. She completed the look with Christian Louboutin shoes and Cartier jewelry. It was, by all accounts, a night built exactly to Swift's specifications -- and Lively was not part of it.Whether the friendship has a future is unclear. What the weekend made plain is that whatever reconciliation was quietly taking shape did not move fast enough -- or far enough -- to earn Lively a seat in the building.
Article Summary: Blake Lively was not invited to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding. The two had been friends for over a decade, but fell out over Lively's lawsuit against director Justin Baldoni. Lively and Ryan Reynolds were spotted at a horse show over the weekend.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs and Baltimore Ravens emerge as top landing spots for $12.3 million Panthers WR
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Kansas City Chiefs and Baltimore Ravens emerge as top landing spots for $12.3 million Panthers WR(Getty)

Which teams are interested in Xavier Legette?

Category



Details



Player



Xavier Legette



Current Team



Carolina Panthers



Rumored Teams



Kansas City Chiefs, Baltimore Ravens



Contract Status



Under contract through 2028



Contract Value



Four years, $12.36 million



Trade Likelihood



Moderate



2026 Cap Hit



2026 Cap Hit



Latest Insider Update



USA Today's Anthony Rizzuti listed the Chiefs and Ravens among potential landing spots



Potential Return



Day 3 draft pick





What are insiders saying about the NFL trade rumors?

Contract details and salary cap implications

How a potential trade could impact both teams

Xavier Legette's future with the Carolina Panthers has become one of the more intriguing storylines ahead of training camp. After two underwhelming seasons, the former first-round pick has slipped down Carolina's wide receiver depth chart following the arrivals of Tetairoa McMillan and rookie Chris Brazzell II. Those developments have fueled fresh NFL trade rumors, with USA Today's Anthony Rizzuti naming the Kansas City Chiefs and Baltimore Ravens among the most logical destinations if the Panthers decide to move on from the 25-year-old wide receiver before Week 1.The Kansas City Chiefs stand out as one of the strongest football fits for Legette. Kansas City's receiver room still carries uncertainty entering the new season. Rashee Rice's future availability remains a question, while Xavier Worthy continues to develop into a complete receiver. Behind them, the Chiefs are relying on players such as Tyquan Thornton, Jalen Royals and Nikko Remigio to compete for meaningful snaps.Legette would give Patrick Mahomes another athletic outside target without requiring a major financial commitment. His combination of size and speed remains attractive despite an inconsistent start to his NFL career.Playing in Andy Reid's offense could also provide the fresh start many believe he needs after producing just 860 receiving yards across his first two seasons.The Baltimore Ravens also make plenty of sense. Zay Flowers remains Lamar Jackson's top receiving weapon, but Baltimore has continued searching for more production from the rest of its receiver group. Rashod Bateman's long-term future has generated speculation, while rookie Ja'Kobi Lane adds another young option to the rotation.Legette would not have to arrive as Baltimore's primary target. Instead, he could compete for snaps while giving Jackson another big-bodied receiver capable of creating yards after the catch. The Ravens have successfully developed several players whose value dipped elsewhere, making this another situation worth monitoring if Carolina decides to listen to offers.USA Today's Anthony Rizzuti recently explored four potential landing spots for Legette, identifying both the Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens as realistic destinations if the Carolina Panthers make the former first-round pick available.Rizzuti pointed to Kansas City's need for another dependable receiver behind Rashee Rice and Xavier Worthy, particularly after Rice's injury history and off-field issues created uncertainty around the position. He also noted that Baltimore could view Legette as a worthwhile addition if the club wants more competition behind Zay Flowers while continuing to reshape its receiving corps. The report comes after Legette's role became increasingly uncertain in Carolina following the arrivals of Tetairoa McMillan and Chris Brazzell II, along with Jalen Coker's continued emergence.Legette remains on the four-year, $12.36 million rookie contract he signed after being selected in the first round of the 2024 NFL Draft.According to Spotrac, he is scheduled to earn a base salary of $1.92 million during the 2026 season while carrying a cap hit of $3.37 million. His contract is fully guaranteed and runs through the 2028 campaign, giving any acquiring team multiple seasons of cost-controlled production before he becomes an unrestricted free agent in 2029.For Kansas City or Baltimore, that contract makes Legette a relatively low-risk investment. Neither team would be taking on a significant financial burden, while both would gain a young receiver with first-round pedigree. From Carolina's perspective, moving Legette could help recover draft capital while clearing a path for McMillan, Jalen Coker and Chris Brazzell II to take on larger offensive roles.For the Panthers, a trade would represent another step in reshaping the receiving room around Bryce Young. McMillan quickly established himself as the team's top target, while Coker has continued to earn a larger role. Brazzell's arrival has only increased competition, leaving Legette fighting for opportunities. Acquiring draft compensation now may carry more value than keeping him in a limited role.Kansas City could benefit immediately if Legette reaches the potential that made him a first-round selection. Mahomes has consistently elevated receivers in Reid's offense, and Legette's size would add something different alongside Worthy and Rice. His affordable contract also gives the Chiefs roster flexibility over the next three seasons.Baltimore offers another appealing opportunity. The Ravens would add a physical receiver without making a major financial commitment, while Legette would have the chance to develop alongside Lamar Jackson in one of the league's most efficient offenses. With training camp approaching, both the Kansas City Chiefs and Baltimore Ravens remain teams worth watching if the latest NFL trade rumors surrounding Xavier Legette continue to gain momentum.
Article Summary: Xavier Legette remains on the four-year, $12.36 million rookie contract he signed after being selected in the first round of the 2024 NFL Draft. USA Today's Anthony Rizzuti named the Kansas City Chiefs and Baltimore Ravens among the most logical destinations if the Panthers decide to move on from the 25-year-old wide receiver. The report comes after Le gette's role became increasingly uncertain in Carolina.

Article Title: Neymar's girlfriend Bruna Biancardi sends cryptic and powerful message after Brazil legend announces retirement
Article Text:
Bruna Biancardi reaffirmed that she is more than a "trophy wife" as Neymar's international career came to an emotional end following Brazil's World Cup exit to Norway. The influencer said she has her own career, team and financial independence while supporting Neymar through his football journey. After Brazil's defeat, Neymar announced his retirement from international football, ending his Brazil career with 80 goals, 59 assists and multiple major honours.

Neymar's girlfriend Bruna Biancardi says she is not a ' trophy wife '

Neymar retires from Brazil duty after World Cup heartbreak

Neymar’s emotional farewell to international football came just weeks after a deeply personal milestone in his family life. Brazil’s World Cup campaign may have ended in disappointment, but long-term girlfriend Bruna Biancardi has continued to make headlines for a different reason. The influencer and entrepreneur recently addressed the notion that she is just the football star’s “trophy wife”, explaining that she has developed an independent career while supporting Neymar through one of the biggest moments of his career.As Neymar represented Brazil at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Biancardi was also celebrating a major family milestone. The couple announced they are expecting another child together, revealing they are set to welcome a baby girl. It will be their third child as a couple, while Neymar will become a father of five.Biancardi shared the announcement on Instagram by teasing a YouTube video, writing:"We've got some news to tell you.. 🤍 Full Video on the YouTube Channel :)."Neymar reacted with excitement in the comments, posting:"I'm going crazy 😂 😂 😂 😂. 4 beautiful girls 😍."Away from their growing family, Biancardi has also spoken openly about her own professional journey.During an appearance on the Elas Que Jogam podcast, she rejected the idea that her success depends on Neymar."People think we don't work, that we stay at home, that we're trophy wives," Biancardi explained."I say, 'Wait a minute, because I have my jobs, I pay my team, I have salaries to pay. I earn my money, I pay my bills.'"The social media personality has built a significant online presence with nearly 16 million Instagram followers and continues working with brands while managing her own business commitments.Earlier in Brazil's World Cup campaign, she also posted an emotional tribute after Neymar secured his place in Carlo Ancelotti's squad."I also saw how Brazil ASKED FOR YOU!" she wrote before adding, "Me and our family will always be with you: in joy or sadness, in victory or defeat, in good days or in bad times..We love you infinitely. May God bless you, protect you and guard you every step of the way. Now is your time!"Brazil's World Cup campaign came to an end with a 2-1 Round of 16 defeat against Norway, a match that also marked the final international appearance of one of the country's greatest players.Neymar scored Brazil's only goal from the penalty spot deep into stoppage time, taking his international tally to 80 goals and 59 assists across 130 appearances.However, the strike was not enough to prevent elimination as Erling Haaland's brace sent Norway into the quarterfinals.Following the defeat, the 34-year-old confirmed that his international career had come to an end."I tried. I tried. It started here at Met Life stadium and I finished here. It is now over," Neymar told reporters after the match.The decision closes a remarkable chapter in Brazilian football.Neymar leaves as the nation's all-time leading scorer and helped deliver memorable successes, including the 2013 FIFA Confederations Cup and Olympic gold on home soil in 2016.Although injuries limited his role during parts of the World Cup, his experience remained valuable inside the squad.Now, with his Brazil career officially over, Neymar begins a new phase focused on club football and family life, while Biancardi continues to balance motherhood with the independent career she says she has worked hard to build.
Article Summary: Neymar's girlfriend Bruna Biancardi says she is more than a 'trophy wife' Says she has her own career, team and financial independence. Neymar retires from international football after Brazil's World Cup exit. Couple announced they are expecting another child together.

Article Title: Erling Haaland mocks Brazil with laughing post after ending Selecao's World Cup dream
Article Text:
Erling Haaland inspired Norway to a stunning 2-1 victory over Brazil in the FIFA World Cup Round of 16, scoring twice to book his nation's first-ever quarterfinal appearance. After the match, the Manchester City striker posted "Well well well" on Instagram, delighting fans. Haaland now has seven tournament goals, matching Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé in the Golden Boot race while setting multiple World Cup scoring records for Norway.

Erling Haaland reacts after firing Norway past Brazil

Erling Haaland continues record-breaking FIFA World Cup campaign

Erling Haaland needed just one social media post to capture the mood after producing one of the biggest performances of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The Norway striker scored twice in a dramatic 2-1 Round of 16 victory over Brazil before sharing a light-hearted reaction online that quickly grabbed fans' attention. His latest heroics not only ended Brazil's title hopes but also sent Norway into uncharted territory with a place in the quarterfinals.Haaland once again proved why he is one of world football's most feared forwards. Norway had to remain patient against a Brazil side that missed several chances, including a first-half penalty from Bruno Guimaraes that goalkeeper Orjan Nyland comfortably saved. Brazil also came close through substitute Endrick, who failed to convert a clear opportunity after a clever pass from Vinicius Junior.The breakthrough finally arrived in the 79th minute. Haaland rose above Brazil's defence to meet a cross before calmly beating Alisson with a composed finish. Just 11 minutes later, he struck again, driving a precise effort into the corner to put Norway in complete control.Brazil managed to pull one goal back, but the late response was not enough to stop Norway from securing a famous victory over the five-time world champions.Shortly after the final whistle, Haaland celebrated the result with a brief Instagram post that read:"Well well well😂."The simple message quickly spread across social media as fans celebrated Norway's biggest World Cup achievement in decades. The victory also booked Norway's first-ever appearance in a FIFA World Cup quarterfinal, where they will face the winner of the Mexico versus England Round of 16 clash in Miami on July 10.Haaland's tournament statistics continue to place him among the greatest World Cup starts ever seen. The Manchester City striker has now scored in each of his four appearances at the tournament and sits alongside Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappe on seven goals in the race for the Golden Boot.His latest brace also added several remarkable milestones to an already memorable campaign. According to Opta, Haaland's seven goals in his first four World Cup matches are the most by any player since Gerd Muller scored eight during the 1970 tournament.He has also become only the fourth player to score four match-winning goals in a single World Cup. The exclusive list includes Gerd Muller, Salvatore Schillaci and Grzegorz Lato, placing the Norwegian among some of football's most iconic tournament performers.Haaland's journey has been impressive from the opening stages. He scored braces against Iraq and Senegal in the group stage before missing Norway's defeat to France. He returned for the knockout round against Ivory Coast and scored the winning goal before delivering another match-winning display against Brazil.Norway will now carry growing belief into the quarterfinals.With Haaland producing goals in crucial moments and the team showing resilience against elite opposition, the Scandinavian side has transformed from tournament outsiders into genuine contenders. Their dream run continues, and Haaland remains firmly at the heart of it.
Article Summary: Norway beat Brazil 2-1 in the FIFA World Cup Round of 16. Erling Haaland scored twice to book his nation's first-ever quarterfinal appearance. Manchester City striker posted "Well well well" on Instagram after the match. He now has seven World Cup goals, matching Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé.

Article Title: "It’s fate ": Erling Haaland's girlfriend Isabel Haugseng Johansen shares heartfelt relationship admission during World Cup run
Article Text:
Erling Haaland's girlfriend, Isabel Haugseng Johansen, has offered a rare insight into their relationship during Norway's World Cup campaign. She admitted she initially liked Haaland's best friend before eventually falling for the Manchester City striker. Johansen has been supporting Norway throughout the tournament, embracing the team's cowboy-themed celebrations and famous Viking Row. The couple, who share a son, continue to enjoy family life while Haaland leads Norway's World Cup charge.

Isabel Haugseng Johansen recalls how her relationship with Erling Haaland began

Isabel Haugseng Johansen embraces Norway's World Cup journey



As Erling Haaland continues leading Norway's memorable FIFA World Cup campaign, his girlfriend, Isabel Haugseng Johansen, has also found herself in the spotlight. From supporting the team in the stands to sharing behind-the-scenes moments from the tournament, Johansen has been documenting the experience while also reflecting on the couple's relationship. Her earlier admission about how she and Haaland first met has resurfaced as fans continue following Norway's journey.Johansen previously revealed that Haaland was not the first person who caught her attention when they were younger. Speaking to The Sun in October 2025, she admitted that she initially liked one of his close friends before eventually developing feelings for the Manchester City striker."I only knew your best friend, so he was the one who I liked first, but then when I saw you I changed my view," Johansen said. "I think it’s fate but you don’t."Haaland remembers the story a little differently. He believes football played a major role in bringing them together because Johansen also played the sport growing up."She played football, we met and all of that, it’s nice because you understand football," Haaland explained. "She remembers the many times she saw me when we were younger, but I don’t. I had that YouTube video singing with my friends."The couple have remained together throughout Haaland's rise to becoming one of world football's biggest stars, with Johansen frequently supporting him during club and international matches.Johansen has been one of Norway's most enthusiastic supporters throughout the World Cup in the United States. Ahead of Norway's Round of 16 clash with Brazil, she shared a playful Instagram Story showing herself using a rowing machine at the gym."Better start practicing the (row) for tomorrow," she joked, referring to Norway supporters' popular Viking Row celebration.She has also embraced the tournament's American atmosphere, wearing a cowboy hat while cheering Norway during their victory over Ivory Coast in Dallas, matching Haaland's own fondness for the western-inspired look.Writing for Vogue Scandinavia, Johansen described how special the Viking Row celebration has become during the tournament."(Once) the Viking Row started, there was no way I was staying in my seat," she wrote. "From Oslo to Times Square, the row has been a special part of this tournament. I get goosebumps every single time we do this."... One last flight, straight to bed and then it’s time to do it all again. That’s the rhythm of a World Cup, and I wouldn’t have it any other way."Away from football, Haaland has often spoken about fatherhood after the couple welcomed their son. The Norway captain previously admitted becoming a parent has helped him mentally switch off from football."And to be honest I think with a kid, it makes me even better because I actually disconnect more than ever," Haaland said. "I don’t think of football at all... But when I go home, I relax even more so I think I need to give a shoutout to my son!"Johansen also revealed that the family even bought a pair of cowboy boots for their son during their World Cup adventure, adding another memorable chapter to Norway's tournament experience.
Article Summary: Isabel Haugseng Johansen recalls how her relationship with Erling Haaland began. She admitted she initially liked his best friend before falling for the Manchester City striker. Johansen has been one of Norway's most enthusiastic supporters during the World Cup.

Article Title: Donald Trump intervention forces stunning FIFA U-turn as Folarin Balogun escapes World Cup ban
Article Text:
FIFA's recent decision to rescind Folarin Balogun's red card has sparked controversy, enabling the US talent to compete against Belgium. (AP Photo)

In an unprecedented development that has sent shockwaves across the footballing world, FIFA has officially overturned the red-card suspension of United States star striker Folarin Balogun. The extraordinary ruling clears the tournament’s standout forward to feature in Monday’s blockbuster Round of 16 clash against Belgium, following a direct intervention from US President Donald Trump Balogun, who has spearheaded the host nation's campaign with three goals, was slapped with an automatic one-match ban after receiving a highly controversial straight red card for an awkward ankle challenge on Bosnia and Herzegovina's Tarik Muharemović during their 2-0 Round of 32 victory. However, Sunday's bombshell announcement revealed that the ban has been deferred into a one-year probationary period. This marks the first time since 1962 that a red card shown during the World Cup proper has not resulted in an immediate suspension.The stunning reversal came to light after President Donald Trump placed a personal phone call to FIFA President Gianni Infantino to request a formal review of the incident.Following the announcement, Trump publicly expressed gratitude to football's governing body for reversing what he labelled "a great injustice," according to the Associated Press (AP).Conversely, the Belgian camp was left absolutely furious. Belgium manager Rudi Garcia fiercely mocked the governing body, stating he did not realize July 5th was April Fools' Day in Europe, while the Royal Belgian Football Association confirmed they are investigating all legal options to preserve the integrity of the sport.United States head coach Mauricio Pochettino aggressively defended the resolution, arguing that his team had already been unfairly punished by playing with ten men for over 30 minutes during the match.The availability of the 25-year-old Monaco frontman significantly boosts American hopes of reaching the quarter-finals for the first time since 2002. With history and political drama intertwining on the pitch, this high-stakes showdown against Belgium has transformed into the most anticipated and contentious battle of the tournament.
Article Summary: FIFA have overturned the red-card suspension of United States striker Folarin Balogun. Balogun received a straight red card for an awkward ankle challenge on Bosnia and Herzegovina's Tarik Muharemović during their 2-0 Round of 32 victory. US President Donald Trump placed a personal phone call to FIFA President Gianni Infantino to request a formal review of the incident. The ban has been deferred into a one-year probationary period.

Article Title: “So much disrespect”: Lamine Yamal’s playful airport antics leave fans divided ahead of Spain and Portugal showdown
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal’s playful airport antics leave fans divided ahead of Spain and Portugal showdown(Getty)

Fans split after Lamine Yamal’s airport joke on Spain teammates goes viral



Spain shift focus to Portugal as knockout challenge awaits

Lamine Yamal grabbed headlines for a reason that had nothing to do with football. Just hours before Spain's FIFA World Cup Round of 16 clash against Portugal, the 18-year-old shared a playful airport video that quickly went viral and divided fans online.The clip showed several Spain players waiting during a routine document check before boarding their flight. Yamal and Nico Williams had already made it onto the plane. Instead of sitting quietly, the Barcelona youngster pointed his phone down at his teammates and laughed as they waited to be cleared. Some fans loved the joke. Others felt it was disrespectful with a knockout match around the corner.The short video offered another behind-the-scenes glimpse into Spain's World Cup journey. Several players remained with airport security officials while their travel documents were checked. Meanwhile, Yamal and Williams had already boarded the aircraft.Seeing his teammates still waiting below, Yamal recorded the scene and laughed, making it look as though he and Williams had earned special treatment while the rest of the squad remained stuck at security. The lighthearted moment soon made the rounds on social media, where fans wasted little time sharing their opinions.One reaction quickly grabbed attention. A fan wrote, "So much disrespect in the World Cup." The comment reflected the view of those who believed Yamal's joke was poorly timed before Spain's biggest game of the tournament.Many others defended the teenager. One supporter commented, "Just a kid; let them enjoy."Another fan acknowledged his talent and wrote, "Kid in reality, lethal in the field.A different fan found the whole situation hilarious, posting, "Bro is really just filming his teammates getting put through it; he is so unserious." The remark summed up how many viewers saw the clip as harmless fun between teammates rather than anything disrespectful.Yamal's playful personality also became part of the discussion. One fan wrote, "Lamine Yamal like roasting his teammates." Another added, "The kid is just charming and funny."The contrasting reactions only added to the buzz around one of football's brightest young stars, proving that even a few seconds of behind-the-scenes footage can become a talking point during the World Cup.The airport video surfaced just before Spain's Round of 16 meeting with Portugal on July 6 in Dallas, one of the standout fixtures of the knockout stage. Spain have carefully managed Yamal's minutes after the hamstring injury that cut short his Barcelona season in April. He returned during the group stage and looked much sharper in Spain's Round of 32 victory over Austria. Ahead of the Portugal clash, Spain coach Luis de la Fuente said Yamal was in "perfect" condition for the knockout phase.Portugal, meanwhile, arrived with plenty of attention on Cristiano Ronaldo and whether the veteran captain would lead the attack in another high-pressure World Cup game. Spain entered the tournament unbeaten, while Portugal hoped to build on their dramatic victory over Croatia and book a place in the quarterfinals.Before either side stepped onto the field, though, it was Yamal's sense of humor that stole the spotlight. A simple airport video turned into one of the tournament's latest viral moments, reminding fans that the teenager continues to make headlines both on and off the pitch.
Article Summary: Lamine Yamal shared a playful airport video that quickly went viral and divided fans. The clip showed several Spain players waiting during a routine document check. Yamal and Nico Williams had already made it onto the plane. The lighthearted moment soon made the rounds on social media, where fans shared their opinions.

Article Title: 'Paraguay's players were absolute disgrace': South American side slammed after FIFA World Cup exit to France
Article Text:
Paraguay's Matias Galarza (23) talks with France's Kylian Mbappe (10) (AP Photo/Martin Meissner)

France booked their place in the World Cup quarter-finals with a hard-fought 1-0 win over Paraguay, but much of the attention after the match focused on Paraguay's behaviour rather than the result.After impressing fans by eliminating Germany on penalties in the previous round, Paraguay faced criticism for their aggressive tactics in a heated and ill-tempered contest in Philadelphia.Speaking to BBC One, Former England goalkeeper Joe Hart did not hold back, saying: "Paraguay's players were an absolute disgrace. If they were on my team, I'd be dragging them off the pitch."Several incidents involving Paraguay players went unpunished, including challenges on Adrien Rabiot and Kylian Mbappe , while France players received multiple yellow cards. Former England defender Micah Richards said: "It was embarrassing to see. Paraguay are better than that. Defensively they were so good and they didn't need to get into these antics."The game's decisive moment came 20 minutes from time when Desire Doue was brought down in the box. After reviewing the incident on the monitor, referee Ilgiz Tantashev awarded France a penalty.Paraguay players protested heavily and attempted to delay the spot-kick, with Gustavo Velazquez even trying to damage the penalty spot before Mbappe converted to score his seventh goal of the tournament, drawing level with Lionel Messi in the Golden Boot race.France coach Didier Deschamps later revealed: "There were some insults form the other bench we could have done without."Tensions continued after the final whistle as players clashed again. Former Scotland winger Pat Nevin summed up Paraguay's approach by saying: "Paraguay tried to wind up the France players, little shoves and nudges but not enough to get a yellow card. Every single dark art you can use."France will now face Morocco in the quarter-finals.
Article Summary: France beat Paraguay 1-0 to reach the World Cup quarter-finals. But much of the attention after the match focused on Paraguay's behaviour. Several incidents involving Paraguay players went unpunished. France will now face Morocco in the quarter-final.

Article Title: 'How has Vaibhav Sooryavanshi not played?' : Ex-England captain baffled by India's decision
Article Text:
India's Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (ANI Photo)

Poll Vote & Share your view Who should be dropped to accommodate Sooryavanshi in the starting XI? Abhishek Sharma Sanju Samson 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

The excitement around Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has gone far beyond India, with the 15-year-old attracting attention from cricket fans across the world. Such has been the hype surrounding the teenage sensation that tickets for India's T20Is in Ireland were snapped up by supporters hoping to watch him in action. However, Sooryavanshi remained on the sidelines throughout the two-match series.The story did not change after India travelled to Durham for the T20Is against England. Despite the growing anticipation around his international debut, the youngster once again had to settle for a place on the bench. His continued omission has left several former cricketers puzzled, including Ravi Shastri and Sunil Gavaskar . Now, former England captains Michael Vaughan and Alastair Cook have also questioned India's decision.Speaking on the Stick to Cricket podcast, Vaughan admitted he could not understand why Sooryavanshi had not been given an opportunity, even suggesting he would like to put the question directly to the BCCI and chairman of selectors Ajit Agarkar.“We must say to the BCCI and the selector, Ajit, how has he not played against Ireland? Our mate, the Kid,” said Vaughan on the Stick to Cricket podcast, to which Cook replied: “I’m there tomorrow, and I’m driving up as a fan to make sure that the 15-year-old kid plays.”While Vaughan and Cook's comments reflected the growing curiosity over Sooryavanshi's absence, the chances of the Indian team management changing course appear slim. The selectors and coaching staff have consistently maintained that the teenager's opportunity will come at the appropriate time.At present, Sooryavanshi's path into the playing XI is blocked by Abhishek Sharma and Sanju Samson , both of whom remain firmly established in India's T20I side. Having played key roles in India's third T20 World Cup triumph four months ago, neither batter is expected to lose his place anytime soon.Even so, Sooryavanshi's omission has continued to spark debate considering the extraordinary rise he has enjoyed over the past five months. The left-hander first captained India Under-19 to the World Cup title, smashing a breathtaking 175 in the final. He then carried that momentum into the IPL, piling up 776 runs to become the youngest-ever Orange Cap winner.Before joining the senior squad for the Ireland tour, Sooryavanshi also impressed for India A in Sri Lanka. His match-winning 94 in the final included the fastest half-century in List A cricket and played a decisive role in India's comprehensive victory, further strengthening the case of those eager to see the teenage prodigy make his international debut.
Article Summary: India's Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is yet to make his international debut. The 15-year-old was left on the bench for India's T20Is against England. Michael Vaughan and Alastair Cook have questioned the selectors' decision. Abhishek Sharma and Sanju Samson remain firmly established in the side.

Article Title: 'Tougher days will come': Ex-India cricketer's reality check for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (Image: IANS)

India face England in Manchester

Former India wicketkeeper-batter Dinesh Karthik has lavished praise on teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, calling him a rare talent capable of rewriting T20 records, while also urging the youngster to stay grounded amid the growing spotlight.The 15-year-old batting prodigy has emerged as one of India's brightest prospects after his remarkable rise in domestic and IPL. He is likely to make his senior India debut during the ongoing T20I series against England, expectations around Sooryavanshi continue to soar.Speaking about the youngster's potential in Sky Sports, Karthik highlighted Sooryavanshi's fearless mindset and ability to score freely against any opposition."I think it's just his ability to score all around the ground and the tempo at which he bats. The fact that he doesn't get fazed by whoever his opponent is stands out. That fearlessness is a special quality," Karthik said.While acknowledging the teenager's immense talent, Karthik reminded everyone that every young cricketer goes through challenging phases, both on and off the field."Like everybody in life, I'm sure he will face challenges with his batting and things that happen away from cricket.He needs to learn how to deal with those situations. Right now, everything looks rosy, but tougher days will come," he added.Asked how far Sooryavanshi could go in the game, Karthik left little room for doubt."The sky is the limit. I genuinely feel he can become an extraordinary T20 batter, and I don't see why he can't break many records in the format," he said."My one piece of advice would be to learn to deal with the noise off the field in a healthy manner because that's going to be his biggest challenge in today's world," Karthik concluded.India and England will look to break the deadlock when they meet in the second T20I at Old Trafford, Manchester, after the series opener in Durham was washed out by rain. Despite the no result, India would have taken confidence from posting a competitive 189/7, powered by half-centuries from Abhishek Sharma and captain Shreyas Iyer.
Article Summary: Former India wicketkeeper-batter Dinesh Karthik has lavished praise on teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. The 15-year-old batting prodigy has emerged as one of India's brightest prospects. He is likely to make his senior India debut during the ongoing T20I series.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El Rubius was eliminated from MrBeast's $1 million streamer challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) beat Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday. Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal put on a marauding batting show to lift RCB to a daunting 250/3. RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL's history.

Article Title: Clavicular Viral Controversy: "Trans women are.....": Clavicular’s viral moment with trans women sparks fresh conversation on internet culture
Article Text:
A viral clip featuring Clavicular and trans women is gaining attention for its calm and honest tone. The conversation explores how online language and trends move across communities. Instead of conflict, the exchange highlights shared influence and mutual awareness. Viewers are engaging with its thoughtful nature, as it reflects how internet culture evolves through collaboration rather than ownership.

Clavicular and trans women share a surprising realization about online trends







The video of Clavicular, a short-video producer, is going around the Internet, yet not the reason why. There is no yelling or over-the-top drama. It is a mere, everyday talk that seems almost novel nowadays, in the age of internet, which is overflowing with content. The scene is easy-going, the tone of the narrative is straightforward, and the characters appear more concerned with conversation than combat.The message that is being addressed is the flow of the conversation. It discusses internet culture, the way people communicate with one another and the place of trends. Rather than bringing out a debate, the encounter towards curiosity. It quietly brings attention to something that a lot of people who use the internet notice but don't often say out loud. People in different communities often have a bigger impact on each other than they think.The conversation begins with a confident and lighthearted comment from one of the trans women present. She says, "You know that trans women are like the OG lip masters, right? We are very talented in the program. Like, I do the peptides, I'm on Zeta." Her tone carries a mix of pride and humor, setting a relaxed vibe at the table.Clavicular responds in a way that keeps the mood steady but adds a different angle.He says, "That is funny because you guys were using a lot of the words in like the South Korean subreddits in like 2014." It’s not confrontational. If anything, it feels like an observation. He points to how certain words and ideas may have traveled across different online spaces over time.Another voice joins in and brings the moment full circle. "Guys, we're like the OGs. I saw a couple of posts about that. We're like copying each other." That line hits in a simple but honest way. It reflects something familiar. Online culture is rarely created in isolation. It grows through sharing, borrowing, and sometimes even unknowingly repeating.That's what makes the clip so powerful. It doesn't want to make a point or win an argument. It only shows a group of people talking, listening, and figuring something out together.This moment feels different in a space where viral content often leads to fights. It reminds people that conversations can be calm, thoughtful, and still important. And sometimes, that honest silence is what makes it work.
Article Summary: A viral clip featuring Clavicular and trans women is gaining attention for its calm and honest tone. The conversation explores how online language and trends move across communities. Viewers are engaging with its thoughtful nature, as it reflects how internet culture evolves through collaboration.

Article Title: Man surrenders after killing wife with tawa
Article Text:
New Delhi:





A 48-year-old man walked into a police station in southwest Delhi on Sunday morning and allegedly confessed to killing his wife with a tawa. The accused, who told cops that he has been undergoing treatment for schizophrenia, has been detained and booked for murder.According to police, the man, a resident of Najafgarh, arrived at Baba Haridass Nagar police station and told the duty officer that he had killed his 43-year-old wife, following a late-night argument.During preliminary questioning, the accused told investigators that he has been receiving treatment for schizophrenia at Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital for around three years. “We are verifying this claim by collecting the necessary medical records. We are also checking whether he has stopped taking his medication,” an officer said.Police said the couple had been married since 2005 and have two sons. The woman was employed at a private company. Their elder son is preparing for engineering entrance examinations, while their younger son is a Class V student. Earlier, the accused worked at an IT company, but had reportedly been unemployed for the last two months.Investigators said the accused was allegedly distressed over the family’s circumstances and frequently argued with his wife over minor issues.During questioning, he allegedly disclosed that they had another argument on Saturday night and, in a fit of anger, he struck her on the head with a tawa, resulting in her death.“Prima facie, we suspect that he killed her between 1am and 2am, remained in the house with the body the whole night, and then went to the police station around 8am. His sons were at their maternal grandmother’s house at the time of the incident,” a senior officer said.Police also learnt that the woman’s family lives in the same locality.Following the confession, a police team rushed to the couple’s residence, where the woman’s body was found. A case has been registered under Section 103 (murder) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.Police said further investigation is underway to establish the sequence of events leading to the killing and ascertain all the circumstances surrounding the incident.
Article Summary: A 48-year-old man walked into a police station in southwest Delhi on Sunday morning and allegedly confessed to killing his wife with a tawa. The accused, who told cops that he has been undergoing treatment for schizophrenia, has been detained and booked for murder. The couple had been married since 2005 and have two sons.

Article Title: Mumbai shanty collapse: Many residents left risky building, returned hours later before it killed 5 kids, woman
Article Text:
The unauthorized structure fell onto an adjoining shanty, injuring a passerby.

What happened





MUMBAI: Five children aged 2-14 and a 32-year-old woman were killed and a passerby injured after a four-storey slum tenement collapsed onto an adjoining ground-floor shanty in Janta Nagar, Mankhurd, on Sunday night amid heavy rain.Four of the victims belonged to the same family, said sources. Local authorities said the four-storey tenement was allegedly unauthorised. Sources said both structures were on the collector's land.Local BJP corporator Navnath Ban said the victims, Nabiya (2), Nihal (6), Aliya (7), Munaf (7), Muskan (14), and Soni (32), were pulled out of the debris after the crash around 8. 30pm and rushed to hospitals, where they were declared dead. The passerby, Rehan Ali (24), survived with a fractured hand.AIMIM corporator Vijay Ubale, who was present at the site, said two dilapidated structures that were on the verge of collapse had been vacated by residents on Sunday afternoon.However, by evening, several locals returned to the area, following which one of the structures collapsed. He said one of the children was from a neighbouring house who had come over to play with the other kids.Ubale said the crash plunged the entire locality in chaos, making it difficult to determine whether more people were trapped under the debris. Rescue operations were still underway at the time of going to press.The on-duty medical officer at Shatabdi Hospital said a medical team from the facility was deputed to the site, and other staffers at the hospital were making further arrangements in case more casualties were brought in.Mayor Ritu Tawade called the house collapse an unfortunate incident. "People are continuing to build such unauthorised constructions. They are continuing to live there and rebuilding repeatedly despite the civic body serving them notices to vacate. Such structures are rising three to four storeys high," she said.Meanwhile, the balcony of a first floor flat in a five-storey building in Belapur crashed on Saturday night. No one was injured. All occupants of the 17 flats of Avighna Cooperative Society in Shahabaz village's Sector 19 were safely evacuated. There were eight wall collapses across Thane.(With inputs from BB Nayak and Manoj Badgeri)
Article Summary: A four-storey slum tenement collapsed onto an adjoining ground-floor shanty in Janta Nagar, Mankhurd. Five children aged 2-14 and a 32-year-old woman were killed and a passerby injured. Four of the victims belonged to the same family.

Article Title: Landslide in Karjat-Lonavala Ghat disrupts Mumbai-Pune rail traffic; 16 trains cancelled, 9 diverted
Article Text:
Passengers have been advised to check the latest train status before commencing their journey as restoration work continues in the Karjat-Lonavala ghat section.

22105/22106 CSMT-Pune-CSMT Indrayani Express

12169/12170 Pune-Solapur-Pune Intercity Express

MUMBAI: Heavy rain triggered a landslide in the South East Ghat section between Karjat and Lonavala late on Sunday, disrupting rail traffic on the busy Mumbai-Pune route. The landslide occurred between Thakurvadi and Monkey Hill Loop Cabin on the Up Main Line of Central Railway’s Mumbai Division.Railway minister Ashwini Vaishnaw reviewed the situation after interacting with Central Railway (CR) general manager Rajeev Shrivastava.He said, “Reviewed the situation arising out of heavy landslides and boulders falling on to the railway tracks in Mumbai-Pune ghat section. The team is fully geared up for restoration. Heavy rainfall is expected today also. Have asked both Western Railway and Central Railway officers to work as one team to ensure early restoration of all train services.”Central Railway has cancelled the following trains scheduled to run on Monday:In addition, nine long-distance trains have been diverted via alternate routes. These include the Ahmedabad-Kolhapur Express, Indore-Daund Express, Ahmedabad-Pune Duronto Express, Bidar-CSMT Express, Hazur Sahib Nanded-Panvel Express, Charlapalli-Indore Humsafar Express, LTT-SMVT Bengaluru Express, Daund-Gwalior Superfast Express and Chennai Egmore-CSMT Mail.Railway officials said incessant rainfall in the ghat section triggered the landslide, with debris and boulders falling on the tracks. Restoration teams have been deployed to clear the affected stretch and restore normal train operations at the earliest.Central Railway’s chief public relations officer Swapnil Nila said, “Incessant rains along with high velocity winds were witnessed over the South East Ghats between Lonavala and Karjat with more than 327 mm rains yesterday and 162 a day before. Today also 140 mm precipitation happened in only 4 hours causing and accentuating the landslide. Restoration efforts are on and resources have been mobilised. All efforts are taken to avoid any inconvenience to the passengers. ”Helplines have been established at major CR stations for real time updates and information dissemination.Passengers have been advised to check the latest train status before commencing their journey as restoration work continues in the Karjat-Lonavala ghat section.
Article Summary: Heavy rain triggered a landslide in the South East Ghat section between Karjat and Lonavala late on Sunday. The landslide occurred between Thakurvadi and Monkey Hill Loop Cabin on the Up Main Line of Central Railway’s Mumbai Division. Restoration teams have been deployed to clear the affected stretch.

Article Title: Two die in Malegaon in slab collapse after heavy rain; landslides affect traffic movement in ghats
Article Text:
Amidst ongoing incessant rains received in Kolhapur and Satara districts, Friday turned out to be the day of landslides. Traffic disruptions occurred in Amba ghat and Karul ghat connecting Kolhapur and Ratnagiri districts owing to landslides. Traffic movement through both Karul ghat and Amba ghat has been diverted via Anuskura ghat as the works to remove the landslide debris are ongoing by the Public Works Department.

Nashik/Kolhapur:





A 65-year-old woman and her grandson were killed after a slab of their house collapsed in Malegaon during the first heavy spell of rain in the textile city, while incessant rainfall in Kolhapur and Satara districts led to multiple landslides and traffic disruptions on Friday.The deceased, Vimalbai Yewale (65) and Chetan Yewale (21), and another family member, Pranita Yewale, were inside the house in the city’s Collector Patta on Friday afternoon, when it started raining heavily.All three sustained severe injuries when the slab crashed. Local residents rescued them and took them to a private hospital, where Vimalbai and Chetan succumbed to their injuries during treatment. Pranita’s condition is critical. Inspector Subhash Sanap of the Chhavani police station said they have registered a case of accidental death.After landslides in Amba and Karul ghats, which connect Kolhapur and Ratnagiri districts, traffic was diverted via Anuskura ghat while the public works department removed debris. Minor landslides also occurred at Pasarni ghat, connecting Panchgani with Wai town, and in Ambenali ghat, connecting Mahabaleshwar in Satara district with Poladpur in Raigad district.A huge tree fell over the road at Amboli ghat, which connects Kolhapur and Sindhudurg districts, leading to a traffic blockade for nearly two hours on Friday afternoon.In Amba ghat, between Dakkhan and Kalakdara in Sangameshwar taluka of Ratnagiri district, a large landslide occurred on Friday morning around 9am. The iron crash barrier erected in the middle of the four-lane highway stopped a large boulder, preventing it from falling directly on moving vehicles or the road, and a major accident was averted.Passengers travelling through the ghat were asked to keep full control over vehicle speed, exercise special caution during the journey, and strictly follow instructions from the administration.Traffic movement between Gadhinglaj and Chandgad tehsils in Kolhapur district was disrupted after a service road bridge collapsed due to increased flow in the Hiranyakeshi river. Seven barrages in the district were submerged under waters of the Panchaganga, Bhogawati and Kasari rivers, affecting local traffic movement between villages. The Rajaram barrage over the Panchaganga river, adjacent to Kolhapur city, was also submerged on Friday at 7pm.Kolhapur district disaster management head, Prasad Sankpal, said, “Incessant rains have been received in the last two to three days. As per the India Meteorological Department, heavy rains are expected in the next three days in ghat areas and in plains from Kolhapur district.”While noting that the administration, farmers as well as citizens were delighted with the arrival of rains after a delay, he issued a word of caution. “The river waters from the district are rising. Five barrages from the district have been submerged, and orders have been given to authorities concerned to stop the traffic movement through these barrages. Even six inches of water has enough current to sweep a bigger vehicle like a truck. No one should take an extra risk and enter swollen waters. If any calamity takes place, then one can immediately contact the Disaster Management team by dialling the toll-free number ‘1077’,” Sankpal said.Heavy rains continued in the region, especially in Kolhapur and Satara districts. In Satara district, Mahabaleshwar received 158mm of rainfall, while Navaja received 105mm and Koyna 53mm in the 24 hours till 8.30am on Friday. Five dam catchments in Kolhapur district received above 95mm rainfall in those 24 hours.An ox belonging to farmer Amol Baburao Kognole was swept away into the flowing Panchaganga river water on Thursday evening in Waliwade village. Despite rescue efforts, the ox was not traced till Friday evening.
Article Summary: A 65-year-old woman and her grandson were killed after a slab of their house collapsed in Malegaon during the first heavy spell of rain in the textile city. Heavy rains in Kolhapur and Satara districts led to multiple landslides and traffic disruptions on Friday. In Satara district, Mahabaleshwar received 158mm of rainfall, while Navaja received 53mm.

Article Title: Teen and sibling thrashed after spat on train in Navi Mumbai
Article Text:
Another incident of verbal spat between a 16-year-old teenage boy and a 20-year-old youth took place in a harbour line train in Navi Mumbai on June 24 night, after the youth accidentally stamped on the teen's foot. (File photo used for representational purpose)





NAVI MUMBAI: A day after the Borivli train murder incident following a violent altercation between two commuters that took place on June 23, yet another incident of verbal spat between a 16-year-old teenage boy and a 20-year-old youth took place in a harbour line train in Navi Mumbai on June 24 night, after the youth accidentally stamped on the teen's foot.The altercation later spilled on to the street, when the youth accompanied by his two friends waylaid the teen near Seawoods Grand Central Mall around 9. 30pm and assaulted him with kicks and fist blows.As the teen's elder brother intervened to rescue him, the trio assaulted him as well in which he sustained a hand fracture.The injured brothers were identified as Rony Rana Shaikh (22) and Alkas Rana Shaikh (16).While, the accused youth was identified as Rohit Surendra Bhosale (22), all residing in Tata Nagar slum pocket, sector 10, CBD-Belapur near Konkan Bhawan.Accused Rohit Bhosale and his two unidentified aides were booked under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) sections for voluntarily causing grievous hurt and joint criminal liability.
Article Summary: A day after the Borivli train murder incident following a violent altercation between two commuters that took place on June 23, yet another incident of verbal spat took place in a harbour line train in Navi Mumbai on June 24 night. The altercation later spilled on to the street, when the youth accompanied by his two friends waylaid the teen and assaulted him with kicks and fist blows.

Article Title: 4 youngsters trapped in elevator of Navi Mumbai high-rise for 90 minutes; rescued safely by firemen
Article Text: NAVI MUMBAI: Four youngsters were trapped inside an elevator between the third and fourth floors of Tulip CHS in Sector 34B, Kharghar, for about 90 minutes from 3 am on Friday due to a power outage in the residential area.The Kharghar fire brigade received the emergency call at 4.25 am and reached the society at 4.35 am.Firefighters rescued the trapped individuals — two men and two women, all aged between 20 and 22 — by forcing open the elevator door from outside using a crowbar and a battery-operated spreader tool.Prashant Darekar, a leading fireman at Kharghar, said,"It took us less than 5 minutes to rescue the trapped youngsters. While, one woman was a tenant in the building, the other three were her friends who had come to drop her home after they returned from a night out."
Article Summary: Four youngsters were trapped inside an elevator between the third and fourth floors of Tulip CHS in Sector 34B, Kharghar, for about 90 minutes from 3 am on Friday due to a power outage. Firefighters rescued the trapped individuals — two men and two women, all aged between 20 and 22 — by forcing open the elevator door from outside.

Article Title: Police arrest two wanted men in separate cases
Article Text:
Two wanted men were arrested on Friday and Saturday

Nashik:





The crime branch unit two arrested two wanted individuals on Friday and Saturday in connection with separate cases registered at the Upnagar and Indiranagar police stations respectively.In the first case, officials arrested a burglar who was on the run for four years. The suspect, identified as Danish Khan, was wanted in a housebreaking and theft case registered in 2022.As he remained untraceable, police filed a chargesheet against him under Section 299 of the CrPC, which allows evidence to be recorded in the absence of an absconding accused.On Friday, ASI Manohar Shinde and head constable Chandrakant Gawali received information that Khan was near Raza Classic Apartment, near Aisha Masjid. Police then laid a trap and arrested him. The accused confessed to the 2022 burglary during interrogation.In the second case, the unit apprehended Ashok Mohite (38), wanted for defrauding a businessman. On Oct 15 last year, Mohite rented 325 iron centring plates worth Rs5 lakh for a construction project for six months from the complainant. However, he failed to return the plates or pay the rental amount to the businessman.He eventually went missing, prompting the businessman to lodge a formal case at the Indiranagar police station.Acting on a precise tip-off received by PSI Sanjay Sanap, the team learnt that Mohite was near a square in Beldarwadi, Mhasrul. Under the guidance of unit 2 in-charge asssistant police inspector (API) Hemant Todkar, police raided and arrested Mohite.They recovered 200 iron shuttering plates worth Rs3 lakh from his possession on Saturday. The accused and the recovered material were handed over to the Indiranagar police station for further proceedings.
Article Summary: Danish Khan was wanted in a housebreaking and theft case registered in 2022. Police laid a trap and arrested him on Friday. Ashok Mohite was wanted for defrauding a businessman. Police recovered 200 iron shuttering plates worth Rs3 lakh from his possession.

Article Title: NEET: Salem division to run special trains, announces helplines
Article Text:
Representative image





COIMBATORE: The Salem division of Southern Railway has made special arrangements to facilitate the candidates appearing for the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET-UG) on Sunday.There are seven towns in the jurisdiction of Salem division where NEET will be conducted. They are Salem, Erode, Tirupur, Coimbatore, Ooty , Namakkal and Karur. Special arrangements have been made across the division, including operation of special trains, to facilitate smooth movement of candidates.Two special trains – one from Chinna Salem to Salem Jn and the other from Tirupattur to Salem Jn – will be operated on Sunday to facilitate candidates appearing for the NEET.Traffic at important level crossing gates will be monitored and regulated to avoid road congestion and ensure smooth movement of candidates to examination centres.Helpdesks will be available at Salem Jn, Erode Jn, Tirupur, Coimbatore Jn, Udagamandalam, Namakkal and Karur Jn railway stations to provide travel related information and assistance to candidates.The helplines: Salem Jn 8778998561, Erode Jn 9840575966, Tiruppur 7904724532, Coimbatore Jn 9384863048, Ooty 7338946729, Namakkal9443516702 and Karur Jn 8056256965.
Article Summary: There are seven towns in the jurisdiction of Salem division where NEET will be conducted. They are Salem, Erode, Tirupur, Coimbatore, Ooty, Namakkal and Karur. Special arrangements have been made across the division.

Article Title: Boy drowns in floodwaters near Erode
Article Text:
Representative image





Erode: A six-year-old boy drowned after being swept away by floodwaters in a stream near Thalavadi in Erode district on Sunday evening. The body of Madhan Karthik, son of Rangaraj of Diginarai village, was recovered on Monday evening. He was a Class II student.Following heavy rain in the Sathyamangalam Tiger Reserve, the stream in Diginarai village was overflowing on Sunday evening.Karthik went to see the floodwaters after telling his parents, but he did not return home.His parents and relatives searched for him near the stream, but they did not find him. It later emerged that the boy was swept away by the floodwaters. They informed the Thalavadi police, who rushed to the spot and joined searches for the boy.Later, fire and rescue services personnel from Hasanur also reached the scene and joined the searches. They retrieved the boy's body from the stream close to Swarnavathi river in Chamarajanagar in Karnataka on Monday. The river is the tributary of the Cauvery. The body was sent to the Sathyamangalam government hospital for postmortem.A case was registered.
Article Summary: The body of Madhan Karthik, son of Rangaraj of Diginarai village, was recovered on Monday evening. He was a Class II student. Following heavy rain in the Sathyamangalam Tiger Reserve, the stream was overflowing on Sunday evening.
